title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Meritnation Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Meritnation Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Meritnation Ventures Solutions in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Meritnation Ventures Solutions:
Meritnation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation Ventures Solutions!
